zh.lifeSummary: 當Sibyl Filiol於1257年出生在英國英格蘭素可笛卡爾 堂時，她的父親William Filliol53歲，母親Ceceila Chanceau49歲。她於1278年與Sir Gilles de Fiennes (Knight)在英國英格蘭素可瓦特林結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1300年在英國英格蘭巴金哈姆爾文多福享年43歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭巴金哈姆爾艾勒斯波利 瓦爾。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sibyl Filiol于1257年出生在英国英格兰素可笛卡爾 堂时，她的父亲William Filliol53岁，母亲Ceceila Chanceau49岁。她于1278年与Sir Gilles de Fiennes (Knight)在英国英格兰素可瓦特林结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1300年在英国英格兰巴金哈姆爾文多福享年43岁，埋葬在英国英格兰巴金哈姆爾艾勒斯波利 瓦爾。

nameMeanings.name: Filiol
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Marcel, Andre, Denys, Gaetan, Germain, Gilles, Herve, Jacques, Jean-Louis, Joffre, Laurette, Laurier.
History: Antoine Filion from Paris, France, married Anne (d’)Anneville in Paris c. 1656, died in Quebec City, QC, c. 1669.

variants.name: Fillion
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Andre, Armand, Gaston, Emile, Lucien, Marcel, Aime, Cecile, Donat, Fernand, Gisele, Jean Luc.

French: from Old French fillon ‘little boy’, a diminutive of fils ‘son’ (from Latin filius), used to denote the youngest son of a family. In North America, this surname is also an altered form of the variant Filion , which is rare in France.

variants.name: Filiault
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Alain, Armand, Donat, Normand, Origene.

French: variant of Filiau (and, in North America, an altered form of this), itself probably a variant of Filion ‘little boy’. The surnames Filiault and Filiau are no longer found in France. Compare Filyaw .

nameMeanings.name: Sibyl
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Variant spelling of   Sybil .  Even in classical times there was confusion between the two vowels in this word.

en.lifeSummary: When Sibyl Filiol was born in 1257, in Old Town, Sussex, England, United Kingdom, her father, William Filliol, was 53 and her mother, Ceceila Chanceau, was 49. She married Sir Gilles de Fiennes (Knight) in 1278, in Wartling, Sussex, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 1 daughter. She died in 1300, in Wendover, Buckinghamshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 43, and was buried in Aylesbury Vale, Buckinghamshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sibyl Filiol est née en 1257, à Old Town, Sussex, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, William Filliol, avait 53 ans et sa mère, Ceceila Chanceau, avait 49 ans. Elle a épousé Sir Gilles de Fiennes (Knight) en 1278, à Wartling, Sussex, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée en 1300, à Wendover, Buckinghamshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 43 ans, et a été enterrée à Aylesbury Vale, Buckinghamshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sibyl Filiol 1257 in Old Town, Sussex, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater William Filliol 53 und ihre Mutter Ceceila Chanceau 49. Sie hat 1278 in Wartling, Sussex, England, United Kingdom Sir Gilles de Fiennes (Knight) geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Sie starb 1300 im Alter von 43 Jahren in Wendover, Buckinghamshire, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Aylesbury Vale, Buckinghamshire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

Lei sposato Sir Gilles de Fiennes (Knight) nel 1278, nel Wartling, Sussex, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 1 figlia. ja.lifeSummary: Sibyl Filiolが1257年にイギリスイギリススセックスオルド トウンで生まれた時，父William Filliolは53歳，母Ceceila Chanceauは49歳であった。1278年にイギリスイギリススセックスワートリングでSir Gilles de Fiennes (Knight)と結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1300年にイギリスイギリスブクインガムシュアイアウエンドバーで43歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスブクインガムシュアイアエイレスブリー ベルにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Sibyl Filiol(이)가 1257년 영국 잉글랜드 수세스 드 타운에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 William Filliol(은)는 53세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Ceceila Chanceau(은)는 49세였다. 그녀는 1278년 영국 잉글랜드 수세스 워틀링에서 Sir Gilles de Fiennes (Knight)(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1300년 영국 잉글랜드 벅잉함실르 웬도버에서 43세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 벅잉함실르 아일레스버이 발에 묻혔다.

Ela casou-se com Sir Gilles de Fiennes (Knight) em 1278, em Wartling, Sussex, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 1 filha. ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sibyl Filiol родилась в 1257 г. в местности олд тоун, суссекс, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени William Filliol было 53 года, а матери, которую звали Ceceila Chanceau, 49. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir Gilles de Fiennes (Knight) в 1278 г. в местности вартлинг, суссекс, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 1 дочь. Она умерла в 1300 г. в местности вендовир, буккингхамшир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 43 лет и была похоронена в местности аилесбури веил, буккингхамшир, Англия, Великобритания.
